questionHtml:
What is the pH of 0.001 mol dm−3 NaOH (aq)?

A. 1

B. 3

C. 11

D. 13

meta.title: What is the pH of 0.001 mol dm−3 NaOH (aq)? A. 1 B. 3 C. 11 D. 13
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?
Reactivity 3.1.4—The pH scale can be used to describe the [H+] of a solution: pH = –log10[H+]; [H+] = 10–pH. Perform calculations involving the logarithmic relationship between pH and [H+].
